title: onopordum acanthium subsp. horridum
intro: Onopordum acanthium subsp. horridum, also known as the thistle, is a plant species belonging to the sunflower family (Asteraceae) and is native to the Iberian Peninsula and northwestern Africa. The plant has been found to possess anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antitumor properties, making it a promising candidate for medicinal applications. The health benefits of Onopordum acanthium subsp. horridum include its potential to alleviate symptoms of digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antioxidant activities. Herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, decoctions, and extracts that can be used to treat various health conditions, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
